title: Flaky, Fragrant Ferment French Sausages Paella
description: Rich, cheese-pull French dish featuring sausages and ferment-kimchi, perfect for a date night.

ingredients.name: Ferment-Kimchi
ingredients.notes: Use kimchi fermented with sea salt and spices

ingredients.name: Sea Salt
ingredients.notes: Use flaky sea salt for added flavor

ingredients.name: Fresh Thyme
ingredients.notes: Use fresh thyme for added flavor

ingredients.name: Salt-Block
ingredients.notes: Use a pre-seasoned salt block for added flavor

instructions: Preheat the salt block to 425°F (220°C) according to the manufacturer's instructions.
Slice the French sausages into 1-inch (2.5 cm) pieces and set aside.
In a large paella pan or skillet, heat the unsalted butter over medium-high heat until melted.
Add the sliced sausages to the pan and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the ferment-kimchi to the pan and cook until heated through, about 2 minutes.
Add the saffron-infused rice to the pan and stir to combine with the sausage and kimchi mixture.
Cook the rice for 5-7 minutes, stirring constantly, until lightly toasted.
Add the grated Comté cheese to the pan and stir to combine with the rice and sausage mixture.
Transfer the paella pan to the preheated salt block and cook for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the paella pan from the salt block and stir in the fresh thyme and lemon juice.
Season the paella with sea salt and black pepper to taste, and serve immediately.
Garnish with additional fresh thyme and lemon wedges, if desired.
